summary: First end-to-end test of Nexora Resorts MVP. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests pass after fixing one 500 bug in POST /api/collections/{name} (Mongo ObjectId leak). Frontend: landing, login, demo OAuth flow, dashboard sidebar (12 nav items, owner username visible), bookings list, logout and protected-route redirect all work. Theme toggle persistence works but only cycles dark<->light (no blurple).

minor.issue: Returned 500 because db.insert_one mutates the dict with ObjectId _id which FastAPI cannot serialize. FIXED in server.py by popping _id before return.

ui_bugs.issue: Cycle only toggles between dark and light. Expected dark -> light -> blurple per PRD. Sequence observed: 'dark' -> '' (light) -> 'dark' -> 'dark'. Blurple state never applied to <html> classList.

integration_issues.issue: Toast confirmation could not be detected via common toast selectors after clicking book-room-* button. POST /api/bookings works (verified via backend tests). Likely sonner/shadcn portal selector mismatch; visually unverified - main agent should confirm a visible toast renders on book.

issues: Background image is rendered but heavily dimmed overlay; check if intentional luxury aesthetic vs. accidental over-dim

action_items: Theme toggle: add the 'blurple' state to the cycle and ensure it applies a class (e.g. 'blurple') to <html> so styles activate.
Verify toast UI on Book Now click renders visibly (Toaster mounted in App, proper sonner/shadcn import).
Optional: lower the landing/login background overlay opacity slightly so the resort image is more visible.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/collections/{name} returned the mutated insert dict containing Mongo ObjectId - serialization 500. Always exclude _id before returning. (Applied fix.)

Demo login creates an owner user once; if perms are later mutated via PUT /api/users/{id}/permissions, subsequent demo logins return the mutated user (no re-grant) — could lock out the demo owner. Consider auto-restoring owner perms on demo login when as_owner=true.
server.py uses datetime.utcnow-style ISO strings stored as text; ok for MVP but sorting by created_at relies on lexical order — fine for ISO 8601 UTC.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/demo; acceptable for demo env.
test_credentials: Demo owner via POST /api/auth/demo {username:'Nexora Owner', discord_id:'000000000000000000', as_owner:true}; UI: /login -> 'Continue as Demo Owner'
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed docs in punishments/events/sessions/authorities/forum_threads/hosted_bots and deleted them in the same test. roblox_group_id was set to 'TEST_12345' in settings (single doc, idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_nexora_api.py is the regression suite (18 tests, all passing). The owner_token fixture self-heals owner perms if a previous test mutated them. After main agent fixes the blurple theme state, retest by clicking [data-testid=theme-toggle] twice from dark and confirm classList includes 'blurple'. Also verify the booking toast visually.
rca_of_the_issue: POST /api/collections/{name} 500: motor's insert_one(doc) adds an ObjectId '_id' field into the same dict; FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize ObjectId, causing 500 with 'TypeError: ObjectId is not iterable'. Fix: doc.pop('_id', None) before returning. Reproduced by POST /api/collections/punishments {title:'x'} -> 500 before fix, 200 after.
